diptrace.operating_system: Windows; exact edition and build pending manual capture

redistribution.basis: The design is wholly synthetic and was authored specifically for this open-source repository; it contains no third-party project data.

artifacts.intended_semantic_difference: Baseline synthetic four-layer board before manual copper-pour and Specctra workflows.
GND copper-pour boundary, thermal and cutout/island configured; refill intentionally not run.
Exactly the same design as before_refill.xml after Update All Copper Pours/Refill only.
Frozen source revision from which input.dsn must be exported.
Real DipTrace Specctra export of the frozen source_board.xml revision.
Real Freerouting session that routes SENSE with a multilayer transition while preserving the source identity.
